finalized_plan.description: Begin by performing a broad web search using generic yet relevant keywords (e.g., "L1vXCYZAYYM bird species analysis", "youtube bird species moment", etc.) to locate any reputable analyses or discussions regarding the video
If initial searches yield potential sources, review these results to identify any specific mentions of the moment with the maximum bird species, noting timestamps and the reported species count

If web search challenges persist, visit the YouTube video page (or transcript) to manually search for keywords like "bird", "species", "max", or similar indicators that could highlight the moment in question
Extract any information about the timestamp and the number of bird species from identified reliable references (such as ornithological blogs, birdwatching forums, or comments by verified experts)
Cross-check findings among multiple sources to validate the exact number of species and confirm the accurate timestamp
Compile the final answer with (a) a concise summary, (b) an extremely detailed explanation including timestamps and source references, and (c) any additional relevant context or caveats
If no conclusive external references are found, report the current research status and request further clarification from the manager, detailing the steps taken and findings gathered so far

root_cause_reasoning: The agent filed to visit the video
